function.name: subagent_code_explorer
function.description: Run the code_explorer sub-agent to analyze and understand the codebase, navigate structures, and provide insights about architecture, data flow, and implementation details.

agent.description: The specialist agent to run for code exploration tasks. This agent focuses on understanding code structure, relationships, and behavior without modifying the codebase.

task.description: A clear description of what needs to be explored or understood in the codebase, such as specific modules, functions, flows, or architectural components.

context.description: Relevant scoped context such as file paths, directories, specific components, or areas of the codebase to focus the exploration.
